message:
feat: add basic local feature resolution system

Implements minimal FeatureResolver that can resolve local features
from file paths. Includes metadata parsing and option handling.

Components:
- FeatureMetadata: Parses devcontainer-feature.json
- ResolvedFeature: Represents resolved feature ready for install
- FeatureResolver: Handles feature resolution with cache dir

Follows TDD: test written first (RED), then minimal implementation
to pass (GREEN). No OCI support or dependency resolution yet.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)
